description: The CurrentLocaleInfo component gives localized values of the user's current locale.

fields.LocaleCode: The code of the culture of the current locale.
fields.LanguageCode: The code of the language of the current locale.
fields.NativeLocaleName: The name of the current locale in native language (Ex: "Español")
fields.EnglishLocaleName: The name of the current locale in english (Ex: "Spanish")
